Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-09-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

DENNIS M. CARR, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) UT SAI LY,

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) AISHA NAEEMAH AKA AISHA NAEEMAH CHILDRESS & DEIDRA MITCHELL for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $19,242.14
Costs - $325.00
Total judgment in the amount of $19,567.14

Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.
